artwork_analysis.balance: asymmetrical, thoughtfully weighted by vertical division
artwork_analysis.visual_tension: between vertical division and horizontal expanse, grounded density and aerial spaciousness
artwork_analysis.density: left side denser, right side more open
artwork_analysis.main_focal_point: the strong vertical red division, the brown circle
artwork_analysis.movement: subtle, implied by layered fields and horizontal progression
artwork_analysis.depth: achieved through overlapping planes and color variations, implied perspective
artwork_analysis.negative_space: the light blue sky and flatter horizontal bands on the right
artwork_analysis.verticality_or_horizontality: horizontal orientation emphasizes breadth, vertical division provides counterpoint
artwork_analysis.internal_organization: highly structured, almost architectural in its division and layering
artwork_analysis.rhythm: created by horizontal bands, undulating layers, and recurring geometric forms
artwork_analysis.brushstroke: visible, combined with palette knife work
artwork_analysis.gesture: controlled, deliberate application of color fields and forms
artwork_analysis.layers: evident in color fields and overlapping forms
artwork_analysis.material_presence: tactile, substantial, consistent with acrylic on canvas
artwork_analysis.sense_of_depth_or_flatness: depth created by color and structural arrangement

format_and_scale.monumentality_or_intimacy: balances monumental presence with contemplative intimacy
format_and_scale.spatial_effect: opens up space, suggests vast territories

artwork_analysis.spatial_presence: strong, defining, alters perception of the room
artwork_analysis.visual_atmosphere: silent, deep, contemplative, structured, slightly melancholic, quietly intense
artwork_analysis.artwork_function: focal point, contemplative piece, statement of refined taste

audience_profile.primary: Collectors and professionals interested in abstract, structural, and symbolic art.
audience_profile.secondary: Individuals seeking works that evoke silence, depth, and contemplation.
audience_profile.buyer_profile: Discerning individuals with an appreciation for sophisticated aesthetics and a substantial spatial presence in art.
audience_profile.collector_type: Contemporary art collectors, those building curated collections with a focus on structural abstraction.
audience_profile.interior_design_relevance: Highly relevant for luxury residences, minimalist interiors, architectural studios, and spaces requiring a refined focal point.
audience_profile.gallery_potential: Excellent, suitable for exhibition in established contemporary art galleries worldwide.

artwork_analysis.commercial_positioning: Premium contemporary art market, positioned for discerning collectors and high-end design projects.
artwork_analysis.one_line_curatorial_read: A profound abstract landscape dissecting vast territories of color and form, inviting contemplation on presence and distant horizons.
artwork_analysis.style_summary: Abstract, structural, symbolic landscape with a contemplative and metaphysical tone, using fields of color and geometric elements.

artist_profile_relation.relevant_statement_connection: The artwork embodies the artist's exploration of 'landscape, consciousness and inner structure,' using 'fields of color, incisions, monoliths, horizons and suspended forms as signs of presence, transition and perception,' aligning with abstraction and symbolic territory.
artist_profile_relation.relevant_visual_language_connection: It is a direct manifestation of the artist's core language, built through 'fields of color, horizons, tectonic lines, divided territories, monoliths, suspended signs and spatial relationships,' creating 'tension between silence, presence, depth and inner order.'
artist_profile_relation.relevant_symbol_connection: Key recurring motifs are visible: 'territory' (divided canvas), 'silence,' 'monoliths' (gray and red blocks), 'horizons,' 'tectonic lines' (divisions), 'divided fields,' 'suspended forms' (brown circle, red blocks), 'red structures,' 'thresholds' (vertical division), 'presence,' and 'distance.'
artist_profile_relation.relevant_atmosphere_connection: The artwork perfectly reflects the preferred atmospheres: 'silent, deep, sober, contemplative and slightly melancholic,' with an 'emotional temperature often moves between nocturnal calm, restrained tension, austerity, distance and quiet intensity.'

suggested_titles.title: Divided Horizon
suggested_titles.subtitle: A study in structural presence and visual division.
suggested_titles.short_description: An abstract landscape in warm tones, bisected by a strong vertical line, revealing two distinct territories under a contemplative sky.
suggested_titles.curatorial_description: This work presents a compelling dual landscape, defined by a powerful vertical division that separates a dynamic, layered terrain from an expansive, horizon-driven field. Geometric forms, appearing as monoliths and distant structures, anchor the composition, while a suspended brown circle adds a cosmic dimension to the serene, light-filled sky. The arrangement creates a visual dialogue between grounded density and aerial spaciousness.
suggested_titles.commercial_description: A powerful abstract composition that commands attention through its distinct structural organization and vibrant yet harmonious color palette. Ideal for collectors seeking a work of significant presence, offering both a sophisticated aesthetic and an invitation to contemplation within a refined interior. Its dimensions make it a striking focal point.

suggested_titles.title: Terracotta Passage
suggested_titles.subtitle: Exploring dawn light and a structured inner world.
suggested_titles.short_description: Rich terracotta and ochre fields meet a pale sky, traversed by a bold red line and enigmatic forms.
suggested_titles.curatorial_description: Bathed in a palette of warm terracotta, ochre, and deep red, this painting evokes the quiet intensity of a primordial landscape. A dominant vertical threshold in rich red dissects the composition, presenting contrasting visual territories: one a dynamic ascent of layered earth, the other an expansive plain beneath a luminous sky, marked by a solitary, suspended sphere and subtle structures. The atmosphere is one of profound silence and contemplative depth.
suggested_titles.commercial_description: An elegant and deeply atmospheric abstract work, characterized by its rich, earthy color palette and structural clarity. This piece offers a sophisticated visual experience, bringing a sense of serene depth and quiet presence to any discerning collection or thoughtfully designed space. The interplay of warm tones and cool accents creates a captivating visual tension.

suggested_titles.title: Solitary Monoliths
suggested_titles.subtitle: The architecture of silence in an abstract territory.
suggested_titles.short_description: A structured abstract landscape featuring bold color fields, geometric forms, and a mysterious celestial body.
suggested_titles.curatorial_description: Within this horizontal expanse, the artist constructs a symbolic territory where monolithic forms and tectonic lines define a structured silence. A prominent red vertical element acts as a threshold, juxtaposing a rugged, ascending terrain with an open, linear horizon. The presence of a deep brown sphere and scattered red blocks across both fields imbues the scene with a sense of ancient presence and profound metaphysical inquiry.
suggested_titles.commercial_description: A compelling abstract painting for collectors drawn to structural elegance and symbolic depth. Its strong visual language, defined by bold divisions and iconic forms against a backdrop of rich, nuanced colors, ensures a commanding presence. This artwork is poised to enhance a contemporary setting, offering a refined focal point and a subtle dialogue on space and existence.

catawiki_listing.subtitle: Original acrylic painting with structural abstraction and warm, evocative landscapes.
catawiki_listing.short_description: An impactful abstract painting in acrylic on canvas, featuring a strong vertical division, warm earth tones, and symbolic geometric forms against a contemplative sky.
catawiki_listing.long_description:
This compelling abstract painting presents a deeply structured landscape, dynamically divided by a robust vertical red element. On the left, undulating fields of green, yellow, and orange ascend, punctuated by a prominent grey monolith and smaller red structures. The right side opens into an expansive territory defined by horizontal bands of warm yellow, muted gray, and vibrant orange, beneath a serene light blue sky. A large brown sphere, suggestive of a sun or moon, hovers in the upper right, complementing the scattered red geometric forms that lend a sense of depth and symbolism to the composition. The interplay of bold color fields and precise structural elements creates a contemplative atmosphere, rich with visual tension and inner order.

The surface exhibits varied textures, showcasing layers built through brushwork and palette knife, contributing to the work's tactile presence and visual depth. The horizontal orientation and substantial dimensions (120 cm wide x 80 cm high) ensure a commanding presence, allowing the artwork to become a focal point within a refined space.

The piece is in excellent condition, with no damage or restorations.
The artwork is shipped unframed and unstretched, carefully rolled inside a protective tube to ensure safe delivery.
catawiki_listing.technical_details: Maurizio Valch, Terracotta Passage, 120 x 80 x 3 cm, acrylic on canvas.
catawiki_listing.condition_statement: The piece is in excellent condition, with no damage or restorations.
catawiki_listing.shipping_statement: The artwork is shipped unframed and unstretched, carefully rolled inside a protective tube to ensure safe delivery.

descriptions.poetic_focus: Through a tapestry of warm earth tones and cool celestial blues, a silent territory unfolds, bisected by a crimson threshold. Here, monolithic forms stand as guardians of an inner landscape, where suspended spheres mark the passage of time and the profound silence of existence.
descriptions.formal_focus: This horizontal composition is a structural exploration of divided planes and chromatic tension. A dominant vertical red band sharply delineates two distinct abstract landscapes: one a layered ascent of organic forms, the other an expansive field of horizontal color bands crowned by a geometric celestial body and resonant red structures. The work presents a rigorous order through its spatial relationships.
descriptions.commercial_focus: An exceptionally poised abstract painting, 'Sin título' offers sophisticated collectors a commanding visual presence. Its elegant structural divisions, rich, evocative color palette, and profound contemplative atmosphere make it a significant focal point for any luxury interior or discerning art collection. An impactful work by Maurizio Valch.

publishing_metadata.marketplace_title: Maurizio Valch - Terracotta Passage - Abstract Structural Painting, 120x80cm
publishing_metadata.marketplace_short_description: An impactful abstract painting by Maurizio Valch, featuring strong structural divisions, warm earthy tones, and symbolic forms creating a contemplative landscape.
publishing_metadata.marketplace_long_description: Discover 'Terracotta Passage' by Maurizio Valch, an original acrylic painting on canvas that masterfully blends structural abstraction with a profound sense of landscape and inner order. The artwork is characterized by its bold vertical division, separating a dynamic, layered terrain from an expansive horizon line. Rich tones of orange, red, and ochre are balanced by serene light blues and muted grays, creating a powerful yet contemplative atmosphere. Geometric forms, reminiscent of monoliths and suspended celestial bodies, punctuate the composition, inviting reflection on presence, distance, and the architecture of silence. This 120x80cm piece boasts a tactile surface, built through layers and subtle incisions, ensuring a significant and engaging wall presence. It is an ideal addition for collectors, interior designers, and art enthusiasts seeking a sophisticated abstract work that offers both visual impact and intellectual depth.

contextual_proposals.context_role: Primary display in a refined living area.
materials: polished concrete or light oak flooring
subtle linen or silk accents in furniture
contextual_proposals.lighting: Soft, diffused natural light from a large window on the left, supplemented by subtle recessed warm LED lighting on the artwork.
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: A direct front view emphasizes the artwork's structural composition and horizontal orientation, ensuring maximum fidelity. The close-up frames the artwork prominently against a clean wall, allowing its dominant colors and internal divisions to be fully appreciated without distraction. The soft lighting highlights the texture and color fields.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: This setting allows the artwork's precise divisions and color fields to be observed with clarity, highlighting its architectural and structural qualities as a contemplative piece for a discerning collector.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: Positions the artwork as a sophisticated statement piece for a minimalist luxury interior, appealing to architects and designers seeking impactful abstract works.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: A contemporary salon with polished concrete floor and matte white walls. A large artwork by Maurizio Valch, 'Sin título', 120x80cm, hangs centrally on a clean wall. Soft, diffused natural light from a large window off-frame to the left, with subtle warm LED spot lighting on the artwork. Minimalist, elegant furniture in neutral tones is subtly visible in the periphery.
contextual_proposals.negative_prompt: Clutter, bad lighting, reflections, busy decor, generic apartment, low-quality furniture.

contextual_proposals.context_role: Showcasing the artwork in a professional art exhibition setting.

The close-up keeps the artwork as the main subject, while showing enough of the pristine gallery environment to convey its professional context.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: This presentation emphasizes the artwork's museum-quality potential and its ability to engage an audience within a formal exhibition space, inviting closer inspection of its layered surface and symbolic elements.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: Ideal for attracting galleries and serious collectors, demonstrating the artwork's significant impact and suitability for high-level public or private collections. The human figure provides scale.

A tall, optional standing male figure (1.80m) stands respectfully to the right, looking towards the artwork, providing scale. Crisp, even gallery track lighting illuminates the piece. The camera is positioned at a three-quarter left view, close-up, focusing on the artwork and the figure's interaction.

The close-up ensures the artwork remains the primary focus, while allowing the viewer to appreciate the quality of the surrounding materials and light.

contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: Appeals to interior designers and high-net-worth individuals who own or design luxury Mediterranean or modern rustic properties, seeking art that complements sophisticated, serene environments.

contextual_proposals.context_role: A central piece within a personal, curated collection.
contextual_proposals.space_type: Private study or library in a townhouse or luxury residence.
materials: dark wood paneling or deep-toned painted walls
contextual_proposals.lighting: Targeted, warm LED lighting on the artwork, supplemented by ambient, dim room lighting.
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: A direct front view ensures the artwork's intricate details and symbolic narrative are presented clearly for a discerning viewer. The close-up emphasizes its role as a focal point within a curated collection, inviting sustained contemplation. The lighting highlights its textured surface against the rich background.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: This setting underscores the artwork's capacity for deep engagement and its place within a thoughtfully assembled private collection, appealing to collectors who value intellectual and aesthetic resonance.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: Targets high-level collectors and discerning buyers who appreciate art as an integral part of a cultivated personal environment. The smaller female figure offers an alternative scale reference in a more intimate setting.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: A private study in a luxurious townhouse, featuring deep-toned painted walls (e.g., charcoal gray or deep teal) and subtle dark wood accents. A large artwork by Maurizio Valch, 'Sin título', 120x80cm, is the central focus on a prominent wall. An optional standing female figure (1.55m) stands to the left, admiring the artwork. Warm, targeted LED lighting directly illuminates the artwork, while the rest of the room has softer, ambient lighting. The camera is positioned for a direct front view, close-up, highlighting the artwork's details and its sophisticated setting.
contextual_proposals.negative_prompt: Office clutter, bright harsh lights, generic bookshelf, distracting elements, cheap materials.
